---
title: "Home"
---

::: {.hero-section}
::: {.hero-text}
# Hi, I'm Hana Chen

## Data Analytics × Marketing Strategy × Business Innovation

I am a data-driven business professional passionate about turning insights into meaningful growth. My work combines **marketing strategy**, **data analytics**, and **creative storytelling** to solve business problems and support better decision-making.

Currently based in Boston, I am pursuing a Master's in **Applied Business Analytics** at Boston University while completing my MBA at National Taipei University.

::: {.hero-buttons}
[View My Projects](projects.qmd){.btn-primary}
[Contact Me](contact.qmd){.btn-secondary}
:::
:::

::: {.hero-image}
![](S__42655761.jpg){fig-alt="Portrait of Hana Chen"}
:::
:::

---

## What I Bring

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.feature-card}
### 📊 Data Analysis

I transform complex information into clear, actionable insights using Excel, SQL, Python, and data visualization techniques.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### 🎯 Marketing Strategy

I create audience-focused marketing strategies supported by consumer insights, content performance, and competitive analysis.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### 💼 Project Management

I collaborate across teams, manage timelines, organize deliverables, and help turn ideas into practical outcomes.
:::
:::

---

## Impact at a Glance

::: {.stats-grid}
::: {.stat-card}
### 9,000+

Social media followers grown from zero through strategic content creation.
:::

::: {.stat-card}
### 9,650

Total video views generated through digital content and engagement strategy.
:::

::: {.stat-card}
### 100+

Participants reached through an award-winning design thinking exhibition.
:::

::: {.stat-card}
### 5+

Professional certificates in Python, SQL, and generative AI.
:::
:::

---

## Featured Projects

::: {.project-grid}
::: {.project-card}
### 🍺 Brewery Marketing & Business Strategy

Developed a business and marketing strategy for launching a brewery in Boston, including market positioning, promotional planning, cost considerations, and sustainability-focused recommendations.

[Read More](projects.qmd#brewery-marketing--business-strategy){.text-link}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### 📦 Delivery Time Analysis

Used SQL to analyze food delivery performance factors and identify insights related to delivery time, platform efficiency, and customer experience.

[Read More](projects.qmd#delivery-time-analysis-for-food-delivery-platforms){.text-link}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### 🤖 Generative AI Food Waste Reduction App

Co-developed an AI-powered mobile app prototype designed to reduce food waste through personalized recommendations and user-friendly digital experiences.

[Read More](projects.qmd#generative-ai-food-waste-reduction-app){.text-link}
:::
:::

---

## Personal Brand

::: {.brand-statement}
I believe strong business decisions come from both **analytical thinking** and **human understanding**. My goal is to use data, creativity, and strategy to build solutions that are practical, meaningful, and growth-oriented.
:::

---

## A Little More About Me

::: {.mini-fun-row}
<span>🎵 Piano, flute & guitar</span>
<span>✈️ Travel dreamer</span>
<span>🎥 Life documentation</span>
<span>🐰 Cute animals lover</span>
<span>🍰 Dessert & food enthusiast</span>
:::
---

## Let's Connect

If you are interested in marketing analytics, project management, business strategy, or data-driven storytelling, I would love to connect.

::: {.hero-buttons}
[Email Me](mailto:hhanaz0903@gmail.com){.btn-primary}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/tsyr-rau-chen-hana/?locale=en-US){.btn-secondary}
:::
